description_long: This is a blocky, stylized doll with a large square head, short black hair, and a cheerful facial expression. The doll is dressed in a black suit with a white shirt and a red-and-blue striped tie, giving it a formal, business-like appearance. Both hands are raised in front of the chest, with the fingers forming a heart gesture, and small pink heart shapes are visible at the fingertips. The face features simple, pixelated eyes and a wide, smiling mouth, with subtle eyebrows above. The shoes are brown and the overall design is reminiscent of voxel art, with clean, geometric lines and a matte finish. The back of the head and body are plain, with no additional details or accessories visible.
description: A blocky, voxel-style doll in a black suit and tie, smiling and making heart gestures with both hands. The doll has short black hair and a cheerful, pixelated face.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's smiling face, suit and tie, and both hands making heart gestures with pink hearts visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the doll's profile, showing the side of the head, ear, and one hand with a pink heart.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, with no facial features or hand gestures visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, ear, and one hand with a pink heart.
attribute_clothing_style: Formal business attire consisting of a black suit, white shirt, and a red-and-blue striped necktie, with brown shoes. The style is reminiscent of classic office wear.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms bent at the elbows and raised in front of the chest, hands forming heart gestures. Legs are straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with closed, upward-curved eyes and a wide, upturned mouth; eyebrows are slightly arched, conveying happiness.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, black hair with a flat top and squared edges, typical of a simple, blocky cut.
